---
title: "Snapshot Conversion — Moved to openalexSnapshot"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Snapshot Conversion — Moved to openalexSnapshot}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

> **These functions have moved.**
>
> `snapshot_to_parquet()`, `build_corpus_index()`, and `lookup_by_id()` are
> now part of the **`openalexSnapshot`** package.
>
> Please install `openalexSnapshot` and refer to its documentation for
> converting the OpenAlex bulk snapshot to Parquet, building ID lookup
> indexes, and extracting records by ID.

```r
# Install openalexSnapshot (once available on r-universe):
pak::pak("openalexSnapshot")
```

Calling these functions in `openalexPro` raises an informative error pointing
to `openalexSnapshot`.
